title: Understanding layer — full PR story
glance: This PR adds a human-in-the-loop understanding layer: literate diffs, quizzes, optional micro-worlds, and a numbered reading order so you can review agent code incrementally.
backgroundDeep: Long agent runs produce many commits. Raw diffs are hard to retain. Andy Matuschak: reading alone often fools us into thinking we understood. This PR adds teaching docs alongside code — generated deliberately via the understanding skill bundle, not a git hook.
backgroundNarrow: The repo had incremental commits and InsForge skills, but no process for humans to learn and verify agent work as it lands.
goal: Run one understanding task → classify commits → write explainers for substantive ones → maintain reading-order.md → PR roll-up.
figure: #1 skills→#2 rule→#3 templates→#4 sample→#5 bundle→#6 index
intuition: Read per-commit explainers in order (entries #1–#6 in reading-order.md). This page is the roll-up if you want the whole arc in one sitting.

steps.label: #2 — Workflow rule (v1)
steps.body: Always-on per-commit rule + docs. Later removed in #6.

steps.label: #4 — Dogfood sample
steps.body: First PR explainer with interactive quiz.

steps.label: #6 — Reading order
steps.body: understanding:index, delete mandatory rule, light template.

quiz.q: How do you read this PR incrementally?

options: skip — row in reading order only
